rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use type scope for assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports
generic_rules: Write deterministic dependency guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool for constants and equations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless model exposes typed ports or constants
Avoid using invalid AGREE scalar type names like 'integer' or 'boolean'
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
Implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
